items.title: Learn open source machine learning with Skolar
items.author: probabl
items.content:
<article>Train_test your skills in open-source ML 💥 Skolar is the FREE learning platform by the makers of scikit-learn. Learn real-world machine learning, prep for certification, and go from zero to hero — the open-source way.
Go to skolar.probabl.ai
#probabl #datascience #machinelearning #scikitlearn #sklearn #ai</article>
